title: Smoke & Curry Garlic Grog
description: A decadent Greek dish featuring a blend of Jamaican curry powder and creamy textures combined with smoke for an indulgent flavor profile.

ingredients.name: Water
ingredients.amount: 2 tablespoons (for coating base coat and final mixture)

ingredients.name: Fresh Herbs
ingredients.amount: a few sprigs of parsley and dill, chopped

instructions: Heat vegetable oil in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and sauté until translucent.
Add the garlic to the pan, stirring constantly for about 30 seconds or until fragrant but not burnt.
Stir in Jamaican curry powder and cook for another minute, ensuring all ingredients are evenly coated with spice.
Gradually whisk in heavy cream and milk. Reduce heat to low, stir continuously until mixture thickens slightly, about 5-7 minutes.
Season the mixture with salt and pepper according to taste. Stir in the Greek yogurt.
Reduce heat to simmer and cook for another 10-15 minutes or until flavors are well combined and desired thickness is achieved.
In a separate bowl, mix all-purpose flour with water to create a slurry. Slowly pour this mixture into the saucepan while stirring continuously to prevent lumps from forming.
Pour in the final coat of milk and allow it to simmer for an additional 2-3 minutes, ensuring a smooth, creamy texture throughout.
Add fresh herbs just before serving for extra flavor enhancement.
Serve hot over grilled or baked bread slices, ideally with a side of crusty bread for dunking. Enjoy as an indulgent gourmet dish!
Note: The final step can also be done in the oven by transferring the mixture to a baking dish and broiling until golden brown and bubbly on top.
